description_long: This is a traditional Japanese-style teapot set, featuring a wide, flat, circular ceramic teapot with a short, stout spout and a large, arching handle wrapped in a striped material for grip and insulation. The teapot is predominantly off-white with a subtle speckled texture, and it displays a blue square with a red floral motif and Japanese text on its body. The lid is circular, slightly domed, and topped with a blue knob, fitting snugly into the teapot's opening. Two small matching teacups accompany the teapot, each decorated with a delicate orange floral pattern along the rim and exterior. The handle is attached at two points on the top of the teapot, and the spout is positioned opposite the handle for easy pouring. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for serving tea in a refined setting.
description: A wide, flat Japanese-style ceramic teapot with a striped arch handle, blue floral motif, and two matching floral teacups. The set is off-white with subtle decorative accents and a domed lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the teapot's spout, floral motif, and both teacups positioned to the left.
description_view_1: Top-rear view highlighting the striped handle, blue knobbed lid, and partial visibility of the floral motifs on the teapot and cups.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle and lid prominent, spout facing away, and both teacups clearly visible to the right.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the handle's attachment points and the teapot's rear, with both teacups in the foreground.
attribute_spout_orientation: Short, straight spout angled slightly upward, positioned at the front center of the teapot body.
attribute_handle_design: Large, arching handle attached at two top points, wrapped in striped material for grip and insulation, moderately thick and ergonomic.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; circular, slightly domed lid with a blue knob, fits snugly.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Floral motif in blue and red on the teapot body, orange floral patterns on the teacup rims and exteriors.
